content.scenarioHint: 用户询问续借服务，工作人员回答是否可以在线操作。
expectedAnswers: Can I renew my books online?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问续借意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了续借关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你正在图书馆办理图书续借，工作人员告诉你可以在线操作，但你担心系统可能显示‘无法续借’，想确认这种情况下该怎么办。
expectedAnswers: What should I do if the system says 'Cannot renew'?
If the renewal fails online, how can I fix it?
Can I still renew in person if the website won't let me?
Is there another way to extend the due date if the system blocks it?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了对‘无法续借’情况的担忧并寻求解决方案
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话习惯，语气自然
关键词覆盖：使用了 'renew', 'system', 'cannot renew' 或其同义表达

content.speakerText: I'm not sure if my book can be renewed. How can I check?
content.speakerTextCn: 我不确定我的书能不能续借，该怎么查？
expectedAnswers: Log in to your library account online — it will show you which books are eligible for renewal.
Check the due date on the app or website; if it says 'Renewable', you can do it.
Go to the library’s website, view your checked-out items, and look for a 'Renew' button next to each book.
evaluationCriteria: 是否提供了清晰的查询方法（登录账户、查看状态、查找按钮）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（renewable, due date, checked-out items）
回答是否结构完整、逻辑清晰，便于用户执行
